overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing an FBI agent exploring a dark, foggy forest and cave system. The character navigates through narrow rocky passages into misty wooded terrain using a flashlight, with atmospheric volumetric fog and detailed natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky cave passage with rough stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the narrow cave passage, sweeping the flashlight across rough rock walls and uneven ground

entered.detail: rough textured stone wall forming the left boundary of the narrow cave passage
jagged rock wall with uneven surfaces on the right side of the passage
narrow tunnel-like opening leading deeper into the rocky cave system

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a claustrophobic cave passage with rough stone walls pressing in on both sides. The flashlight beam illuminates textured rock surfaces and the narrow path ahead, creating deep shadows in the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest trail with tall pine trees

events.description: exits the narrow cave into an open forest area with tall pine trees and atmospheric fog

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the forest path, illuminating trees and undergrowth while passing wooden barriers

entered.detail: tall coniferous trees forming the forest canopy with visible branches against the night sky
weathered wooden barrier alongside the path partially covered in moss
dense ferns and shrubs lining the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the cave, the scene opens into a misty forest with tall pine trees. The character walks along a dirt trail passing wooden fences while the flashlight cuts through the fog, revealing dense undergrowth and tree trunks.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest terrain with large boulders

events.description: terrain becomes increasingly rocky with large boulders and stone outcrops appearing among the trees

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky forest terrain, carefully moving around large boulders and dense vegetation

entered.detail: massive rock formations and boulders scattered throughout the forest floor
exposed rocky ledges and stone formations rising from the ground

segments.scene_description: The forest trail becomes more rugged with large boulders and rock outcrops dominating the landscape. The character continues through the misty woods, flashlight revealing the textured surfaces of massive stones and thick vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the suffocating confines of a stone cave into a vast, mist-shrouded wilderness. It begins within a claustrophobic passage where a flashlight beam cuts through deep shadows and illuminates rough, pressing stone walls. As the character emerges from the cave, the environment opens into a foggy forest of tall pine trees and wooden fences lining a dirt trail. The scene then shifts as the trail becomes more rugged, with the flashlight revealing massive boulders and rock outcrops that begin to dominate the landscape. Finally, the camera pushes further into the misty woods, navigating through thick vegetation and textured stone surfaces.
